title: Gendos no sound scene
wikitext:
[]: Gendo's no sound scene Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri Jun 29, 2007 7:01 pm Well I searched and searched and couldn't find it... so if you find it please don't get mad :oops: Anyways, you know how nobody really knows what was said? Well I recently watched the spanish version of Evangelion and he said something! He said, "I did love you" or "I did love her" it could be translated either way. It's just, he said it in an ambigious way... Spanish(Spain so it's formal) to English >.< I just thought I had to share. Even though it might not be correct, but it's reasonable with what others have been discussing. SSD told me it was post worthy, but I couldn't find the thread!

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 29, 2007 7:17 pm I found several threads touching upon this by searching for Gendo and Ritsuko, with all terms selected. The main one is below. http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=270
